code:
import io
import string

fn is_space(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn is_digit(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b >= 48 and b <= 57
end

fn skip_ws(_ s: String, _ start: Int) -> Int
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = start
  mut done = false
  while not done
    if i >= n
      done = true
    else
      match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(b)
        if is_space(b)
          i = i + 1
        else
          done = true
        end
      when None
        done = true
      end
    end
  end
  i
end

fn read_digits(_ s: String, _ start: Int) -> Int
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = start
  mut done = false
  while not done
    if i >= n
      done = true
    else
      match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(b)
        if is_digit(b)
          i = i + 1
        else
          done = true
        end
      when None
        done = true
      end
    end
  end
  i
end

fn gcd(_ a: Int, _ b: Int) -> Int
  mut x = a
  mut y = b
  mut done = false
  while not done
    if y == 0
      done = true
    else
      let t = x % y
      x = y
      y = t
    end
  end
  x
end

fn parse_one(_ s: String, _ from: Int) -> Option<Int>
  let start = skip_ws(s, from)
  let stop = read_digits(s, start)
  if stop <= start
    None
  else
    string.parse_int(string.substring(s, start, stop))
  end
end

fn find_end(_ s: String, _ from: Int) -> Int
  read_digits(s, skip_ws(s, from))
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let after_first = find_end(input, 0)

match parse_one(input, 0)
when Some(a)
  match parse_one(input, after_first)
  when Some(b)
    println("gcd=#{gcd(a, b)}")
  when None
    println("gcd=#{a}")
  end
when None
  println("gcd=0")
end
